caption:
"🎉 Exciting News from Daorae Johor Bahru! New Menu Alert!

​The ultimate flavor duo is finally coming together!

Get ready for a heavenly match of tender, succulent BoSSam (steamed pork belly) and spicy, sweet, and chewy Nakji-bokkeum (stir-fried octopus)! 🐙🥩

​✨ Sneak Peek: [BoSSam Nakji-bokkeum] ✨

​Just look at that perfect presentation in the photo.😍

Wrap a slice of savory pork belly with a piece of perfectly seasoned, spicy octopus for the ultimate bite. The contrast of melt-in-your-mouth pork and bouncy octopus is absolutely unforgettable!

​Launching very soon at Daorae JB. Stay tuned! ❤️

​#KFood #DaoraeJB #NewMenu #KoreanFood #BoSSam

​"🎉 新山 Daorae 韩餐厅新菜品预告！

​完美组合终于诞生啦！

鲜嫩多汁的韩式白切肉（BoSSam），搭配香辣微甜、Q弹 🦑 的辣炒章鱼，这绝妙的碰撞绝对刷新你的味蕾！

​✨ 新 menu 预告：[白切肉搭配辣炒章鱼 / BoSSam Nakji-bokkeum] ✨

​看看 Photo 里这让人垂涎欲滴的精致摆盘！😍

一片油脂恰到好处的白切肉，裹上一块酱汁入味的辣炒章鱼，一口咬下，肉香与章鱼的弹牙在舌尖完美融合，层次感爆棚！

​即将登陆新山 Daorae，敬请期待！❤️

​"🔥 조호바루 Daorae 한식당 신메뉴 예고 2탄!

​이번엔 우삼겹과 주꾸미의 역대급 만남입니다!
고소한 풍미 가득한 우삼겹과 매콤 쫄깃한 주꾸미가 만난 **[주꾸미우삼겹]**이 곧 출시됩니다! 🐙🥩

​사진 속 완벽한 비주얼이 보이시나요? 😍
철판 위에서 지글지글 익어가는 부드러운 우삼겹에, 매콤한 양념이 쏙 벤 주꾸미, 그리고 아삭한 콩나물의 식감까지! 이 조합은 맛이 없을 수가 없죠.

​스트레스가 확 풀리는 매콤 고소한 맛의 진수!
곧 Daorae에서 만나보실 수 있으니 조금만 기다려주세요! Coming Soon! ✨

 🔥 New Menu Alert 2 at Daorae Johor Bahru!

​Get ready for another legendary food pairing!
The rich, savory flavors of thinly sliced beef brisket (Woo-samgyeop) meet the spicy, chewy goodness of baby octopus (Jukkumi) in our upcoming dish: [Jukkumi Woo-samgyeop]! 🐙🥩

​Just look at the stunning setup in the photo! 😍

Picture tender beef strips sizzling on a hot grill, combined with perfectly seasoned spicy baby octopus and crunchy bean sprouts. It’s a texture and flavor party you don't want to miss!
​Craving that perfect balance of spicy, savory, and satisfying?

It’s coming very soon to Daorae JB. Stay tuned! ✨

​"🔥 新山 Daorae 韩餐厅新菜品预告第二弹！

​这次是肥美牛五花与辣炒小章鱼的王牌碰撞！
油脂香浓的精品乌三格（Woo-samgyeop / 薄切牛五花）遇上香辣Q弹的小章鱼，全新震撼新品 [小章鱼炒牛五花] 即将登场！🐙🥩

​快来看看图片里这让人无法抗拒的颜值！😍

铁板上整齐排列的鲜嫩牛五花，包裹着浓郁酱汁的香辣小章鱼，再搭配上清脆的豆芽和鲜葱。当牛肉的醇香与章鱼的鲜辣在铁板上滋滋作响，简直是视觉与味觉的双重盛宴！
​无辣不欢、无肉不欢的你绝对不能错过！
即将登陆新山 Daorae，敬请期待！✨

#​新山美食 #新菜上市 #新山韩国料理 #JBfood #Kfood

Make your lunch break more delicious this March and April. Whether it’s a packed Dosirak full of side dishes or a classic Gimbap & Ramyeon combo, we’ve got your cravings covered for just RM 18.50.
